nodes.label: daily-calendar.html
nodes.rationale: Main entry point for the daily calendar view. Contains the core UI layout and a heavy orchestration script that bridges data to the grid.

nodes.label: bootstrap()
nodes.rationale: Main initialization function in daily-calendar.html. Fetches schedule, seeds inputs, and waits for CalendarManager to be ready.

nodes.label: renderStrip()
nodes.rationale: Calculates and renders the top 'Active window' strip (Wake to Sleep duration).

nodes.label: renderStats()
nodes.rationale: Computes and renders the Total Available, Study Time, and Scheduled stats Pills.

nodes.label: onCalendarRendered()
nodes.rationale: Hook called after the grid renders. Updates axis labels, skins blocks with type marks (C/S/B), and picks the current task.

nodes.label: CalendarManager
nodes.rationale: Orchestrator for the daily view. Manages the lifecycle: load -> render -> event-handling.

nodes.label: CalendarRenderer
nodes.rationale: Pure UI renderer. Creates the 15-minute grid and maps events to pixel positions.

nodes.label: CalendarEvents
nodes.rationale: Interaction controller. Handles the snapping logic (20px per 15 mins) for drag and resize.

nodes.label: CalendarService
nodes.rationale: Data model and logic service. Handles time-to-minutes conversions and API interactions.

nodes.label: CalendarViewManager
nodes.rationale: Manages switching between Daily, Weekly, and Monthly views. Potentially overlaps with CalendarManager.

edges.rationale: Uses MutationObserver on .calendar-grid to trigger onCalendarRendered.

hyperedges.label: Data Consistency Flow
hyperedges.rationale: All three nodes rely on the same StorageService 'dailySchedule' key for consistent time display.
